bug.description: missing error propagation where a failure is silently ignored

prompt:
There is a missing error propagation where a failure is silently ignored downstream of function HAL_UARTEx_EnableStopMode in the targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32L5 subsystem.
The function is located at targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32L5/STM32Cube_FW/STM32L5xx_HAL_Driver/stm32l5xx_hal_uart_ex.c:480.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
